text:
うむ、よろしい！
やはり君は優秀なアークスだな。
杞憂で済んでよかった。

アイテムは属性強化する毎に
シンセサイザーが必要になるが
やればやるだけ属性値も向上する！

属性値は武器によって
最大値が異なるが、高ければ高いほど
大きな威力を発揮するのだ！

Now THAT'S what I like to see, kid! You're a
regular ol' ace of an ARKS! Gotta say, this
old man has a LOT less on his mind, now.

You need a Synthesizer every time you Enhance
Elements, but it'll increase its
Element Level in turn!

The maximum Element Level varies
depending on weapon, but the higher
it is, the more power it has!

Geez, this reminds me of the good ol' days
when I had Elements comin' out the wazoo...
